description: Used to diagnose the climate and air quality responses to the regionally heterogeneous evolution of anthropogenic non-CH4 SLCF emissions. Air pollutant emissions, including non-CH4 tropospheric O3 precursors, aerosols and their precursor emissions (BC, OC, NH3 and SO2) are set to PI levels. All other forcings evolve as in `historical`.  This is for models with interactive chemistry. Models without interactive chemistry should run `hist-Aer` instead.
branch_information: Branch from `piControl` at a time of your choosing
